files.patch:
@@ -22,7 +22,7 @@ describe("resolvePythonExecutablePath", () => {
       const shim = path.join(shimDir, "python3");
       await fs.writeFile(
         shim,
-        `#!/bin/sh
if [ "$1" = "-c" ]; then
  echo "${realPython}"
  exit 0
fi
exit 1
`,
+        `#!/bin/sh
if [ "$1" = "-c" ]; then
  echo "${realPython}"
  exit 0
fi
exit 1
`,
         "utf-8",
       );
       await fs.chmod(shim, 0o755);
